headline: M&T Bank (MTB) Stock Faces Mixed Analyst Target Changes As Fair Value Edges Higher
summary: The latest update on M&T Bank keeps the modeled fair value tightly centered, with a small move from US$233.17 to about US$233.33 per share that reflects only a fine tuning of assumptions. That kind of marginal price target adjustment lines up with recent analyst commentary, where some firms are trimming targets while others raise them by US$2 to US$5 as they reassess what investors may be willing to pay for the stock. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets and competing views...
